use_cases: Primary call-to-action button in sign-in and registration forms
Destructive action buttons for account deletion or logout confirmations
Secondary navigation actions in authentication flows
Ghost-style buttons for less prominent actions within forms
Icon buttons for inline actions in card headers or form sections
ai_summary: A foundational Button component with class-variance-authority for multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition patterns. Part of the Ruixen.UI sign-in card library, commonly used for authentication interfaces in SaaS applications, supporting desktop and mobile platforms with accessible focus states and disabled configurations.
